title: [MTR4] 相鉄9000系|Sotetsu 9000 Series
description: Resource pack that adds Sotetsu 9000 Series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **Sotetsu 9000 Series** are trains produced by Tokyu Car Corporation between 1993 and 2001. A total of 7 10-car trains are produced alongside 8000 Series for all Sotetsu routes, replacing the old 6000 Series.
Except 9701×10, all trains were refurbished as part of the Sotetsu Design Brand Up Project from 2016 to 2019. These trains received a new paint job (YOKOHAMA NAVY BLUE), refreshed interior, full-colour LED displays, etc.
These trains are expected to be replaced by the new 13000 series from Spring 2026.

This resource pack is to add the Sotetsu 9000 Serie into Minecraft with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2025.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Sagami Railway Co., Ltd.
